post.description: Creates a Draft cart for a given PropertyId. Customer/date fields are optional.
Returns cart header totals and lines grouped by package header.
Updates customer fields, time window, timezone, notes, and cart-level discount.
Adds a package header line and expands its included services/items into child lines so the selection can be edited without changing the package definition.
Adds a service line to the cart. Optionally attach it to a package header line as an AddOn.
Adds an item line to the cart. Optionally attach it to a package header line as an AddOn.
Updates quantity, schedule, duration override (services), price override, and line discount. If the line is a Package header, only quantity is updated and children quantities are scaled.
Soft removes a line by setting IsActive=false/Status=Removed. If the line is a Package header, children are removed too.

propertyId.description: Property Identification for the specific property (GUID)

identifier.description: User identifier such as Roomnumber or Member ID depends on the property and the PMS

message.example: Hello, I would like extra towels in my room.

sentBy.description: Who sent the message (email, username, or identifier)

reason.description: Reason or context for the chat uses RequestId for Ticket reference

sentFrom.description: Origin of the chat message: 'guest' or 'property'

emails.description: Collection of the most recent sent emails for the property, not including assign to, message send, escalation and ticket created

propertyId.description: Property identifier used to filter groups

type.description: Type of communication context, e.g., 'email' or 'sms'

propertyId.description: Property to retrieve communication activity for

year.description: Year of the month being queried

scheduled.description: Scheduled communications for the given month

recurring.description: Recurring communication settings active in the given month

propertyId.description: Property identifier whose communication data is being requested
Property identifier used to filter scheduled or recurring settings

rawHtml.description: If RawHtml is null, HTML will be taken from ContentBlock.RawHtml.

acsPhoneNumber.description: ACS phone number assigned to this property.

isOptedOut.description: Indicates if the guest opted out from SMS.

lastMessageAtUtc.description: Last message date/time (Puerto Rico local display in API output).

message.description: Chat message content in Base64 format. The server will decode and store it.

sentBy.description: Identifier of the sender (email, username, etc.)

reason.description: Reason or context, typically the RequestId the chat refers to

sentFrom.description: Origin of the chat message. Valid values: 'guest', 'property'

listId.description: Identifier of the list this guest belongs to.

id.description: Guest ID. Use 0 or null when creating a new guest.

phone.description: Guest's mobile phone in E.164 format.

id.description: List ID. Set to 0 for new lists.

propertyId.description: Property ID to which this list belongs.

createdBy.description: User who created or updated the list.

createdDateTime.description: UTC date/time for when the list was created or updated.

subject.description: Subject line used when this list is sent as a message.

body.description: Body text of the list if used for communication.
body.example: Reminder: Maintenance will occur tomorrow at 9 AM.

image.description: Base64 encoded image representing the department.

description.description: Description of the department’s purpose or responsibilities.
description.example: Handles repairs and general maintenance for the property.

image.description: Department image stored in Azure Blob Storage.

id.description: Operational hour entry ID. Use null for new entries.

dayOfWeek.description: Day of the week being configured.

closed.description: If true, the department is closed for that day.

serviceAtThisHour.description: Indicates whether the department is currently able to provide service.

isClosed.description: Indicates whether the department is closed for the selected day.

color.description: Hex color code used for styling the session layout for the selected property.

font.description: Font family applied to the session layout for the selected property.

propertyName.description: Property name to be used throughout the session context.

logo.description: Azure Blob Storage URL for the property logo used during the session.

operationalHours.description: List of operational hour configurations for the department.

font.description: Font family applied to the session layout for the selected property.

logo.description: Azure Blob Storage URL for the property logo used during the session.

image.description: Azure Blob Storage URL of the department image.

operationalHours.description: Operational hours associated with this department.

services.description: List of services and subservices offered by the department.

id.description: Member identifier. Leave null or 0 to create; set a value to update an existing member.

groupId.description: Group identifier this member belongs to. Usually not required on create; will be set from the group.

fullName.description: Full name of the group member

email.description: Email address of the member (required to persist the member)

fullName.description: Full name of the group member

phone.description: Phone number of the member, used for SMS if applicable

body.description: Email body content (HTML or plain text)
body.example: Dear Guest, your reservation has been confirmed...

sendDateTime.description: Date and time the email was sent

employeeId.description: Unique employee identifier, normally sourced from Azure AD or HR systems.

displayName.description: Full display name of the employee.

email.description: Primary email address of the employee.

phone.description: Phone number of the employee, normalized in E.164 format if available.

company.description: Company or property to which the employee belongs.

department.description: Department or area the employee is assigned to.

jobTitle.description: Job title or role of the employee within the organization.

fullName.description: Full name of the guest or end user.

phone.description: Phone number in E.164 format for SMS or WhatsApp.

id.description: Escalation setting ID. Use null when creating a new rule.

escalatedTo.description: Recipient email or identifier of who receives escalation notifications.

responseTimeMinutes.description: Time allowed before this escalation level triggers (in minutes).

id.description: Property ID to filter requests by.

requestedBy.description: User ID (GUID) or email address of the requesting user.

conversationId.description: Conversation identifier whose messages you want to retrieve.

pageSize.description: Page size. Max 200 messages per page.

ascending.description: If true, messages are ordered oldest → newest. If false, newest → oldest.

propertyId.description: Property identifier where the SMS conversation belongs.

participant.description: Participant phone number. Will be normalized internally.

participantName.description: Optional participant name. If conversation exists with 'Unknown', this name may update it.

listId.description: ID of the list this guest belongs to.

id.description: Item ID. Use 0 when creating a new item.

departmentId.description: Department ID this item belongs to.

propertyId.description: Property identifier whose conversations will be listed.

searchE164.description: Optional search term. Matches participant number or name (LIKE).

isPublished.description: Indicates whether the list is currently published.

subject.description: Message subject used when sending communications to guests.

body.description: Body of the message sent to guests.
body.example: We look forward to hosting you.

createdBy.description: Creator username or email who created the list.

createdDateTime.description: UTC timestamp indicating when the list was created.

isPublished.description: Indicates whether the list is published and visible.

color.description: HEX color theme associated with the property.

font.description: Font used for UI rendering of list data.

lists.description: Collection of lists under the specified property.

id.description: Group identifier. Leave null or 0 to create a new group. Set a value to update an existing group.

propertyId.description: Property that owns this group

name.description: Display name of the mail/SMS group

groupList.description: List of members to create or update. Members without an email are ignored.
Members that belong to this group

id.description: Identifier of the media record. Use 0 or null when creating a new media item.

value.description: Base64 encoded image string or an existing media URL. If base64, it will be uploaded and converted to a URL.

sequence.description: Sequence number used to order media items (e.g., in carousels or galleries).

delete.description: If true, marks this media item for deletion instead of update.

id.description: Unique identifier of the media record.

image.description: Public URL of the media resource (typically an image in Azure Blob Storage).

sequence.description: Sequence number used to order media items (e.g., in carousels or galleries).

id.description: Menu identifier. Set to 0 when creating; use a positive value to update.

venueId.description: Identifier of the venue this menu belongs to.

type.description: Menu type (must match MenuType dropdown, e.g., 'Breakfast', 'Drinks').

media.description: URL pointing to the menu file (PDF, image, etc.).

startHour.description: Start time when the menu becomes available (local time).

endHour.description: End time when the menu stops being available (local time).

sequence.description: Display order used when showing multiple menus for the same venue.

media.description: URL to the menu document or image.

sequence.description: Sorting order for menus within the same venue.

userIdentifier.description: Unique external identifier for the user

relationship.description: Relationship to the property or account

specialRequests.description: Special requests associated with the user

name.description: Display name of the property shown on dashboards.

logo.description: Logo URL displayed on the dashboard card.

type.description: Type or category of the property.

description.example: Boutique oceanfront hotel with adults-only experience.

tabTiles.description: Tab configuration that groups tiles into sections for the CMS dashboard.

galleryList.description: Media gallery items associated with this property for CMS usage.

departmentList.description: Departments associated with this property, used to power CMS dropdowns and widgets.

propertyId.description: Identifier of the property for which the report is generated.

departments.description: List of department IDs to include in the report.

startDateTime.description: Start date and time (inclusive) for the reporting period, in UTC.

endDateTime.description: End date and time (inclusive) for the reporting period, in UTC.

top.description: Number of top records (locations/items/services) to return.

command.description: Optional command: Pause, Resume, or Delete.

hardDelete.description: If Command = Delete, specifies hard delete (true) or soft delete (false).

fromSenderId.description: Sender identifier for email communications, chosen from PropertyEmailSenders.

propertyId.description: Property identifier where the recurring communication will run.

executionTime.description: Time of day (PR local) when the communication will be executed.

body.example: Dear guest, we are excited to welcome you tomorrow.

escalatedRequests.description: Total number of requests escalated by the escalation system in the selected period.

topDepartmentId.description: Identifier of the department with the most requests in the period.

topDepartmentCount.description: Number of requests associated with the top department.

filters.description: Optional filters used to refine the ticket report (status, date range, etc.).

reportDate.description: Timestamp when the report was generated (string formatted).

service.description: Main service category of the request.

department.description: Name of the department handling the request.

createdDateTime.description: Date and time the request was created.

status.description: Current ticket status (e.g., Open, In Progress, Closed).

clientName.description: Display name of the requesting client.

assignedTo.description: Employee or user currently assigned to the ticket.

location.description: Location / room / area associated with the request.

closedAtDateTime.description: Date and time when the ticket was closed (if applicable).

image.description: Image URL or base64 content associated with the request.

desiredDateTime.description: Guest's desired date and time for the service.

items.description: List of items included in the request.

chat.description: Conversation history related to this request.

createdDateTime.description: Creation date/time of the ticket (formatted string).

description.description: Concatenated description: service, subservice, and 'Requested Items' if any.

location.description: Location / room / area for the request.

requestedBy.description: User ID (GUID) or email of the person placing the request.

departmentId.description: Department ID that should receive this request.

service.description: Main service category (e.g., Housekeeping, Maintenance, Room Service).

subService.description: Sub-service or specific type of request (e.g., Extra Towels, Breakfast, AC Repair).

createdDateTime.description: When the request was created (usually set by the system).

image.description: Optional base64-encoded image attached to the request.

desiredDateTime.description: Desired scheduled date/time for the service.

items.description: Optional list of request items (name + quantity).

surveyId.description: Survey ID that this response belongs to.

questionId.description: Question ID that this answer is responding to.

text.description: Text answer to the question. Can be a numeric rating (e.g., '5') or free-text comment.

answerBy.description: Optional identifier of who answered (e.g., email, room number, profile ID).

id.description: Identifier of the scheduled communication to update.

command.description: Optional command to perform on the scheduled communication. Supported values: 'Cancel', 'Delete'. If omitted, a regular update is performed.

scheduledDate.description: New scheduled date/time in Puerto Rico local time. Converted to UTC internally. Required for rescheduling.

subject.description: Updated subject for the communication (email only).

body.description: Updated body of the email or SMS message.
body.example: Dear guest, this is your updated reminder...

recipients.description: Updated list of recipients. If provided, overwrites existing recipients.

hardDelete.description: When Command = 'Delete': true = hard delete (remove row); false or null = soft delete.

updatedBy.description: User identifier or email that performed the update.

subject.description: Subject line for email communications. Ignored for SMS.

body.description: Body of the email or SMS message.
body.example: Dear guest, we look forward to welcoming you tomorrow...

recipients.description: List of recipients for the blast (email and/or phone).

scheduledDate.description: Optional schedule date/time in Puerto Rico local time. If null, the message is sent immediately.

fromSenderId.description: Sender identifier for email communications, chosen from PropertyEmailSenders.

font.description: Font family applied to the session layout for the selected property.

propertyName.description: Property name to be used throughout the session context.

logo.description: Azure Blob Storage URL for the property logo used during the session.

ticketId.description: Unique identifier of the ticket linked to this request.

department.description: Name of the department handling this ticket.

quantity.description: List of requested items and their quantities.

media.description: Image URL or base64 content associated with the request.

chat.description: Conversation history related to this ticket.

writtenBy.description: Name of the user who wrote the note.

media.description: Optional base64-encoded media associated with the note.

createdDateTime.description: Date and time when the note was created.

id.description: Unique identifier of the tile in the dashboard (read model).

name.description: Display name of the tile in the dashboard response.

description.description: Description of the tile as returned by the API.

sequence.description: Sequence/order of the tile inside the dashboard.

url.description: Navigation URL associated with this tile.

images.description: Resolved media collection associated with the tile, ready for display.

id.description: Unique identifier of the tile in the dashboard.

name.description: Display name of the dashboard tile.

description.description: Description shown in the dashboard for this tile.

sequence.description: Order in which the tile appears in the dashboard.

url.description: Destination URL for the dashboard tile.

images.description: List of images to associate with the tile (used for carousels or hero banners).

id.description: Tile item identifier. Use 0 or null when creating a new tile item.

parentId.description: Identifier of the parent tile to which this item belongs.

image.description: Image URL representing this tile item.

name.description: Name of the tile item displayed to end users.

description.description: Detailed description of the tile item.

startDateTime.description: Start date and time of the tile item's availability (ISO 8601 string).

endDateTime.description: End date and time of the tile item's availability (ISO 8601 string).

promotion.description: Promotion text, if any, associated with this tile item.

sequence.description: Display order of this tile item within its parent tile.

url.description: URL used for navigation when the tile item is selected.

isActive.description: Indicates if the tile item is active and should be shown in the UI.

createdBy.description: User who created or last updated the tile item.

isPublished.description: Indicates if the tile item is currently published and visible to guests.

isHtml.description: If true, the system will generate an HTML page URL for this tile item.

color.description: Hex color code used for styling this view model.

font.description: Font applied to all text rendered from this view model.

name.description: Display name used as the main title of the tile item list.

propertyName.description: Name of the property associated with this view.

logo.description: URL for the logo used in the header of this view.

heroBanner.description: Hero image background URL used for the tile list.

description.description: Main descriptive text for this tile item view.

type.description: Type of view being rendered. Possible values: 'information', 'department', 'venue'.

color.description: Hex color code used for styling the session layout for the selected property.

font.description: Font family applied to the session layout for the selected property.

propertyName.description: Property name to be used throughout the session context.

logo.description: Azure Blob Storage URL for the property logo used during the session.

id.description: Identifier of the tile item as string (usually the DB Id).

image.description: Image URL associated with the tile item, used in cards or listings.

name.description: Display name of the tile item.

description.description: Text description providing details about the tile item.

startDateTime.description: Start date and time when the tile item becomes valid or visible (ISO 8601).

endDateTime.description: End date and time when the tile item is no longer valid or visible (ISO 8601).

promotion.description: Short label or promo text highlighting a promotion for the item.

sequence.description: Order in which the tile item is displayed within the parent tile.

url.description: URL associated with the tile item, used for redirection or deep linking.

isActive.description: Indicates if the tile item is active and should be visible to end users.

isHtml.description: Indicates if the tile item renders an HTML page generated by the system.

color.description: Hex color code used for styling tiles for the selected property.

font.description: Font family applied to the tile layout for the selected property.

propertyName.description: Name of the property that owns these tiles.

logo.description: Azure Storage URL or CDN URL for the property logo.

tiles.description: Collection of tiles configured for the property.

name.description: Display name of the tile shown in the application.

image.description: URL of the image associated with this tile.

sequence.description: Order in which the tile is displayed within the property.

url.description: URL that the user is redirected to when clicking the tile.

top.description: Top most requested items across all locations.
Top locations with their most requested items.

location.description: Location where the item was requested.

timeToClose.description: Time taken to deliver the item and close the request.

location.description: Location where the service was requested (room, table, area, etc.).

top.description: Service and subservice description for this request.

timeToClose.description: Time taken to close this specific request, formatted as 'X days, Y hr and Z min'.

location.description: Location (room/area) where the item requests were made.

top.description: Most requested item for this location.

amount.description: Total quantity requested of the top item for this location.

avgTime.description: Average delivery time for the top item at this location.

details.description: Detailed breakdown of each request for the top item at this location.

location.description: Location (e.g., room number or area) being summarized in the report.

amount.description: Total number of requests for this location.

top.description: Most requested service/subservice combination for this location.

avgTime.description: Average time to close requests for this location, formatted as 'X days, Y hr and Z min'.

details.description: Detailed breakdown of individual requests for this location.

top.description: Top locations grouped by request volume and service metrics.
Name of the item that was requested.

location.description: Location where this item is most frequently requested.

amount.description: Total quantity requested for this item across all locations.

avgTime.description: Average delivery time for this item.

details.description: Detailed breakdown of each request for this item.

conversationId.description: Conversation identifier whose participant name will be updated

name.description: New name for the participant in the conversation

id.description: When provided, identifies the venue to update. Omit or use Guid.Empty to create a new one.

propertyId.description: Identifier of the property that owns this venue.

description.description: Detailed description used on dashboards and detail views.
description.example: Cocktails, snacks and live music by the pool.

heroBanner.description: Hero banner URL to show in front-end dashboard.

image.description: Tile image URL used in tiles list or dashboard cards.

url.description: Deep-link URL for the venue in the app.

location.description: Location description for the venue inside the property.

images.description: Hero carousel / gallery images to be created, updated or deleted for this venue.

propertyId.description: Unique identifier of the property to which this venue belongs.

name.description: Display name of the venue (e.g., 'Ocean Pool Bar').

slogan.description: Short slogan or tagline for the venue.

image.description: Main tile image URL used for cards or tiles representing the venue.

description.description: Longer description of the venue and its experience.
description.example: Cocktails, snacks and live music by the pool.

heroBanner.description: Hero banner image URL used in detailed venue views.

phone.description: Contact phone number for the venue.

email.description: Contact email address for the venue.

url.description: Deep-link URL to open the venue page in the guest app or website.

location.description: Human-friendly description of where the venue is located within the property.

menuList.description: Menu configurations associated with the venue (e.g., breakfast, dinner, drinks).

venueTypes.description: Dropdown values for all available venue types (used for configuration screens).

menuTypes.description: Dropdown values for all available menu types (e.g., Main Menu, Drinks, Breakfast).

images.description: Carousel images associated with the venue (gallery, hero, etc.).

Bearer.description: JWT Authorization header using the Bearer scheme. Example: "Authorization: Bearer {token}"
Bearer.name: Authorization
